subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — I appreciate the interest in exploring a collaboration. I'd be happy to set up an introductory call.

I have some availability next week on Tuesday or Thursday between 10:00–12:00 UTC, or Wednesday afternoon (14:00–16:00 UTC). Do any of those windows work for you? If not, let me know what suits your schedule and I'll do my best to accommodate.

Regarding the internal contact directory and direct lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share those details externally. Once we've had our initial conversation and there's mutual interest in moving forward, I can help facilitate the right introductions through the appropriate channels.

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards
